info.title: Financial Datasets API
info.description: Stock market API with real-time and historical financial data for 30,000+ tickers over 30+ years. Financial statements, equity prices, insider trades, SEC filings, and more.

tags.name: Financial Statements
tags.description: Access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements

tags.name: Company Information
tags.description: Company facts like ticker, name, and description

tags.name: Earnings
tags.description: Earnings press releases and related data

tags.name: Crypto
tags.description: Cryptocurrency price data and market information

tags.name: Financial Metrics
tags.description: Financial ratios, metrics, and key performance indicators

post.description: Search for specific financial line items across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for one or more tickers.

get.description: Retrieve insider buy and sell transactions reported by a company's insiders for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter results to a specific insider by name; obtain valid names from the insider-trades names endpoint.

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: Filter results to a specific transaction type; obtain valid types from the insider-trades transaction-types endpoint.

parameters.name: filing_date
parameters.description: Return only trades filed on this exact date.

parameters.name: filing_date_gte
parameters.description: Return only trades filed on or after this date.

parameters.name: filing_date_lte
parameters.description: Return only trades filed on or before this date.

parameters.name: filing_date_gt
parameters.description: Return only trades filed strictly after this date.

parameters.name: filing_date_lt
parameters.description: Return only trades filed strictly before this date.

get.summary: Get the equity holdings of an investment manager
get.description: Retrieve institutional equity holdings, queried either by investment manager or by ticker (supply exactly one of the two).

parameters.name: investor
parameters.description: Name of the investment manager whose holdings to retrieve.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Ticker symbol whose institutional holders to retrieve.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

get.description: Retrieve descriptive company facts and identifiers for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve the list of SEC filings submitted by a company.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: Filter by one or more SEC filing types; repeat the parameter to pass multiple values.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

get.description: Retrieve the raw text of individual Items within a specific SEC filing.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: SEC form type of the filing to read items from.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filing year to select.

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Filing quarter, used for 10-Q filings.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: Specific filing Item to retrieve.

parameters.name: accession_number
parameters.description: Accession number identifying the filing, used for 8-K filings.

parameters.name: include_exhibits
parameters.description: Whether to include the raw text of linked exhibits; applies only to 8-K filings, and when enabled each exhibit object carries its full text.

get.description: Deprecated. Retrieve revenue broken down by reporting segment; use the income-statement segments endpoint instead.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Date or time period the reported revenue relates to, in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve income statements for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve balance sheets for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve cash flow statements for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve earnings-related press releases for the given ticker.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

get.description: Retrieve a real-time price snapshot for a stock, including current price, day change, and day change percent.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

get.description: Retrieve income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for the given ticker in a single response.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key identifying the company; an alternative lookup key to the ticker.

get.description: Retrieve recent news articles for a specific company, or broad-market news when the ticker is omitted.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Ticker symbol for company-specific news; omit to receive broad-market news.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

get.description: Retrieve end-of-day historical price data for a stock over a date range.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Aggregation interval of each returned price bar.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Earliest date to include in the returned price series.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Latest date to include in the returned price series.

get.description: Retrieve financial metrics for a ticker across valuation, profitability, efficiency, liquidity, leverage, growth, and per-share categories.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol of the company; required when `cik` is not provided.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key of the company; an alternative to the ticker.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

200.description: The historical financial metrics and ratios for a ticker

get.description: Retrieve a real-time snapshot of a stock's financial metrics across valuation, profitability, efficiency, liquidity, leverage, growth, and per-share categories.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: SEC Central Index Key of the company; an alternative to the ticker.

post.description: Screen for stocks by applying filters across financial metrics drawn from income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.

get.description: Retrieve the most recent earnings snapshot for a ticker; optional estimate, surprise, and change fields are returned only when available.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

period.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

limit.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

order_by.description: Field used to sort the results; prefix with a minus sign to sort in descending order.

currency.description: Currency in which the screened financial figures are expressed.

historical.description: Whether to evaluate filters against historical financial data rather than the latest only.

field.description: Financial metric or identifier the condition is evaluated on; use comparison operators for metric fields and the 'in' operator for ticker or cik.

operator.description: Comparison operator applied between the field and the value; the 'in' operator works only with the ticker or cik field for multi-value matching.

oneOf.description: The value to compare against for single-value operators (gt, lt, gte, lte, eq)
Array of ticker or cik values to compare against when using the 'in' operator

value.description: Value to compare against: a single number for comparison operators, or a list of ticker/cik strings for the 'in' operator.

filters.description: List of filter conditions combined to screen the stock universe.

items.description: The financial metric to search for.

line_items.description: List of financial line-item names to retrieve across the supported statements.

tickers.description: List of ticker symbols whose financials are searched.

period.description: Reporting cadence of the financial data to return.

limit.description: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

report_period.description: Date the underlying report covers, marking which fiscal point the figures belong to.

period.description: Reporting cadence to which this record's figures correspond.

currency.description: Currency in which the returned financial figures are reported.

additionalProperties.description: Additional financial metrics based on the search criteria.

search_results.description: List of stocks matching all supplied filters.

insider_trades.description: List of insider transaction records matching the query.

institutional-ownership.description: List of institutional holding records matching the query.

income_statements.description: List of income statement records for the ticker.

balance_sheets.description: List of balance sheet records for the ticker.

cash_flow_statements.description: List of cash flow statement records for the ticker.

financials.description: Container bundling the income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.

segmented_revenues.description: List of segmented-revenue records for the company.

income_statements.description: List of income statement records for the ticker.

balance_sheets.description: List of balance sheet records for the ticker.

cash_flow_statements.description: List of cash flow statement records for the ticker.

company_facts.description: Descriptive facts and identifiers for the company.

filings.description: List of SEC filings matching the query.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

cik.description: SEC Central Index Key of the filing company.

filing_type.description: SEC form type of the filing.

accession_number.description: SEC accession number identifying the filing.

items.description: List of Item sections extracted from the filing.

press_releases.description: List of earnings press releases for the ticker.

snapshot.description: Real-time price snapshot for the stock.

news.description: List of news articles matching the query.

prices.description: List of historical price bars for the ticker.

next_page_url.description: URL to fetch the next page of price results, when more data is available.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

issuer.description: Name of the company that issued the traded security.

name.description: Name of the insider who carried out the transaction.

title.description: Role or title the insider holds at the company.

is_board_director.description: Whether the insider serves on the company's board of directors.

transaction_date.description: Date on which the transaction took place.

transaction_shares.description: Number of shares bought or sold in the transaction.

transaction_price_per_share.description: Price per share at which the transaction was executed.

transaction_value.description: Total monetary value of the transaction.

shares_owned_before_transaction.description: Shares the insider held before the transaction.

shares_owned_after_transaction.description: Shares the insider held after the transaction.

security_title.description: Title of the security involved in the transaction.

filing_date.description: Date the transaction was filed with the regulator.

ticker.description: Ticker symbol of the held security; populated when querying by investor.

investor.description: Name of the holding investment manager; populated when querying by ticker.

report_period.description: Reporting period to which this holding record corresponds.

price.description: Estimated purchase price of the equity position.

shares.description: Number of shares held in the position.

market_value.description: Market value of the equity position.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

report_period.description: Date the underlying report covers, marking which fiscal point the figures belong to.

period.description: Reporting cadence to which this record's figures correspond.

items.description: Revenue segments parsed from SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings in XBRL form.

amount.description: Reported revenue amount for the segment, in the company's reporting currency (default USD).

end_period.description: End of the segment's reporting interval; provided only for quarterly data.

start_period.description: Start of the segment's reporting interval; provided only for quarterly data.

segments.description: Dimension breakdown describing how the segment is classified.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

report_period.description: Date the underlying report covers, marking which fiscal point the figures belong to.

fiscal_period.description: Issuer's fiscal-period label for the reporting interval.

period.description: Reporting cadence to which this record's figures correspond.

currency.description: Currency in which the monetary figures in this record are reported.

revenue.description: Total sales the company generated over the reporting period.

cost_of_revenue.description: Direct costs attributable to producing the goods or services sold.

gross_profit.description: Revenue remaining after subtracting the cost of revenue.

operating_expense.description: Operating costs incurred outside the direct cost of revenue.

selling_general_and_administrative_expen.description: Selling, general, and administrative overhead for the period.

research_and_development.description: Spending on research and development activities.

operating_income.description: Profit from core operations before interest and taxes.

interest_expense.description: Cost of interest on the company's borrowings.

income_tax_expense.description: Income tax charged against the period's profit.

net_income_discontinued_operations.description: Net income contributed by operations that have been discontinued.

net_income_non_controlling_interests.description: Portion of net income attributable to non-controlling (minority) interests.

net_income.description: Bottom-line profit after all expenses, interest, and taxes.

net_income_common_stock.description: Net income attributable to common shareholders after preferred claims.

preferred_dividends_impact.description: Effect of preferred dividends on income available to common shareholders.

consolidated_income.description: Total consolidated income including all controlled entities.

earnings_per_share.description: Net income allocated to each outstanding common share.

earnings_per_share_diluted.description: Earnings per share assuming all dilutive securities are converted.

dividends_per_common_share.description: Dividends declared per common share for the period.

weighted_average_shares.description: Time-weighted average of common shares outstanding during the period.

weighted_average_shares_diluted.description: Diluted weighted-average share count including dilutive securities.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

report_period.description: Date the underlying report covers, marking which fiscal point the figures belong to.

fiscal_period.description: Issuer's fiscal-period label for the reporting interval.

period.description: Reporting cadence to which this record's figures correspond.

currency.description: Currency in which the monetary figures in this record are reported.

total_assets.description: Sum of all assets the company holds.

current_assets.description: Assets expected to be converted to cash or used within one year.

cash_and_equivalents.description: Cash on hand plus highly liquid short-term holdings.

inventory.description: Value of goods held for sale or production.

current_investments.description: Short-term investments classified as current assets.

trade_and_non_trade_receivables.description: Amounts owed to the company from trade and non-trade sources.

non_current_assets.description: Assets not expected to be realized within one year.

property_plant_and_equipment.description: Carrying value of property, plant, and equipment.

goodwill_and_intangible_assets.description: Goodwill together with other intangible assets.

investments.description: Total investment holdings of the company.

outstanding_shares.description: Number of common shares currently issued and outstanding.

tax_assets.description: Recognized tax-related assets such as deferred tax assets.

total_liabilities.description: Sum of all the company's liabilities.

current_debt.description: Portion of debt due within one year.

trade_and_non_trade_payables.description: Amounts the company owes from trade and non-trade sources.

deferred_revenue.description: Payments received for goods or services not yet delivered.

deposit_liabilities.description: Liabilities arising from customer or counterparty deposits.

non_current_debt.description: Portion of debt due beyond one year.

tax_liabilities.description: Recognized tax-related obligations such as deferred tax liabilities.

shareholders_equity.description: Residual interest in assets after deducting liabilities.

retained_earnings.description: Cumulative earnings retained rather than distributed as dividends.

accumulated_other_comprehensive_income.description: Cumulative gains and losses recorded outside the income statement.

total_debt.description: Combined current and non-current interest-bearing debt.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

report_period.description: Date the underlying report covers, marking which fiscal point the figures belong to.

fiscal_period.description: Issuer's fiscal-period label for the reporting interval.

period.description: Reporting cadence to which this record's figures correspond.

currency.description: Currency in which the monetary figures in this record are reported.

net_income.description: Net income carried from the income statement as the starting point of the cash flow.

depreciation_and_amortization.description: Non-cash depreciation and amortization added back to earnings.

share_based_compensation.description: Non-cash expense from share-based employee compensation.

net_cash_flow_from_operations.description: Net cash generated by core operating activities.

capital_expenditure.description: Cash spent acquiring or upgrading long-term assets.

business_acquisitions_and_disposals.description: Net cash from acquiring or disposing of businesses.

investment_acquisitions_and_disposals.description: Net cash from buying or selling investments.

net_cash_flow_from_investing.description: Net cash generated or used by investing activities.

issuance_or_repayment_of_debt_securities.description: Net cash from issuing or repaying debt securities.

issuance_or_purchase_of_equity_shares.description: Net cash from issuing or repurchasing equity shares.

dividends_and_other_cash_distributions.description: Cash paid out as dividends and other distributions.

net_cash_flow_from_financing.description: Net cash generated or used by financing activities.

change_in_cash_and_equivalents.description: Net change in cash and equivalents over the period.

effect_of_exchange_rate_changes.description: Impact of foreign-exchange rate movements on cash balances.

ending_cash_balance.description: Cash and equivalents balance at the end of the period.

free_cash_flow.description: Operating cash flow remaining after capital expenditure.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

name.description: Full legal or common name of the company.

cik.description: SEC Central Index Key assigned to the company.

exchange.description: Stock exchange on which the company is listed.

is_active.description: Whether the company is currently active.

listing_date.description: Date the company was listed on the exchange.

number_of_employees.description: Total number of employees at the company.

sec_filings_url.description: URL to the company's SEC filings.

sic_code.description: Standard Industrial Classification code of the company.

sic_industry.description: Industry derived from the company's SIC code.

sic_sector.description: Sector derived from the company's SIC code.

weighted_average_shares.description: Weighted-average shares outstanding for the company.

cik.description: SEC Central Index Key of the filing company.

accession_number.description: SEC accession number uniquely identifying the filing.

filing_type.description: SEC form type of the filing.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

url.description: URL to the filing on the SEC website.

text.description: Raw text content of the filing Item.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

url.description: URL to the full press release.

date.description: Publication date of the press release.

text.description: Full body text of the press release.

price.description: Current trading price of the stock.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

day_change.description: Price change since the previous trading day's close.

day_change_percent.description: Percentage price change since the previous trading day's close.

market_cap.description: Current market capitalization of the company.

time.description: Timestamp of the snapshot as a human-readable UTC value.

time_milliseconds.description: Timestamp of the snapshot in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

price.description: The current price of the cryptocurrency.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol.

day_change.description: The price change over the last 24 hours.

day_change_percent.description: The percentage price change over the last 24 hours.

time.description: The timestamp of the price snapshot in human-readable format in UTC.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

source.description: Publisher or source of the news article.

date.description: Publication date of the news article.

url.description: URL to the full news article.

sentiment.description: Sentiment classification assigned to the news article.

open.description: Opening price of the ticker for the interval.

close.description: Closing price of the ticker for the interval.

high.description: Highest price of the ticker during the interval.

low.description: Lowest price of the ticker during the interval.

volume.description: Trading volume of the ticker during the interval.

time.description: Interval timestamp as a human-readable UTC value.

time_milliseconds.description: Interval timestamp in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

market_cap.description: Total market value of the company's outstanding shares.

enterprise_value.description: Total company value combining equity market cap with debt, net of cash.

price_to_earnings_ratio.description: Share price relative to earnings per share.

price_to_book_ratio.description: Share price relative to book value per share.

price_to_sales_ratio.description: Share price relative to revenue per share.

free_cash_flow_yield.description:
Free cash flow relative to market capitalization.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

peg_ratio.description: Price-to-earnings ratio relative to earnings growth.

gross_margin.description:
Gross profit expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

operating_margin.description:
Operating income expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

net_margin.description:
Net income expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_equity.description:
Net income expressed relative to shareholders' equity.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_assets.description:
Net income expressed relative to total assets.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_invested_capital.description:
After-tax operating profit relative to invested capital.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

asset_turnover.description: Revenue generated per unit of average total assets.

inventory_turnover.description: Cost of goods sold relative to average inventory.

receivables_turnover.description: Revenue relative to average accounts receivable.

days_sales_outstanding.description: Average number of days to collect receivables.

operating_cycle.description: Combined cycle of converting inventory and receivables into cash.

working_capital_turnover.description: Revenue generated per unit of average working capital.

current_ratio.description: Current assets relative to current liabilities.

quick_ratio.description: Liquid current assets relative to current liabilities.

cash_ratio.description: Cash and equivalents relative to current liabilities.

operating_cash_flow_ratio.description: Operating cash flow relative to current liabilities.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt relative to shareholders' equity.

debt_to_assets.description: Total debt relative to total assets.

revenue_growth.description:
Year-over-year change in revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

earnings_growth.description:
Year-over-year change in earnings.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

book_value_growth.description:
Year-over-year change in book value.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

earnings_per_share_growth.description:
Change in earnings per share over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

free_cash_flow_growth.description:
Change in free cash flow over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

operating_income_growth.description:
Change in operating income over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

ebitda_growth.description:
Change in EBITDA over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

payout_ratio.description:
Dividends paid relative to net income.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

earnings_per_share.description: Net income allocated to each outstanding common share.

book_value_per_share.description: Shareholders' equity allocated to each outstanding share.

free_cash_flow_per_share.description: Free cash flow allocated to each outstanding share.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the analyst estimate.

period.description: The period of the analyst estimate.

fiscal_period.description: Issuer's fiscal-period label for the reporting interval.

currency.description: Currency in which the monetary figures in this record are reported.

estimated_revenue.description: Analyst-consensus estimated revenue for the period; present only when available.

revenue_surprise.description: Whether reported revenue beat, missed, or met the estimate; present only when available.

earnings_per_share.description: Reported earnings per share for the period.

estimated_earnings_per_share.description: Analyst-consensus estimated earnings per share; present only when available.

eps_surprise.description: Whether reported EPS beat, missed, or met the estimate; present only when available.

net_income.description: Reported net income for the period.

gross_profit.description: Reported gross profit for the period.

operating_income.description: Reported operating income for the period.

weighted_average_shares.description: Weighted-average common shares outstanding for the period.

weighted_average_shares_diluted.description: Diluted weighted-average share count for the period.

cash_and_equivalents.description: Cash and equivalents at period end.

total_debt.description: Total interest-bearing debt at period end.

net_cash_flow_from_operations.description: Net cash from operating activities for the period.

net_cash_flow_from_investing.description: Net cash from investing activities for the period.

net_cash_flow_from_financing.description: Net cash from financing activities for the period.

change_in_cash_and_equivalents.description: Net change in cash and equivalents for the period.

free_cash_flow.description: Free cash flow for the period.

revenue_chg.description: Percentage change in revenue, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

net_income_chg.description: Percentage change in net income, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

operating_income_chg.description: Percentage change in operating income, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

gross_profit_chg.description: Percentage change in gross profit, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_operations_chg.description: Percentage change in operating cash flow, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_investing_chg.description: Percentage change in investing cash flow, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_financing_chg.description: Percentage change in financing cash flow, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

free_cash_flow_chg.description: Percentage change in free cash flow, QoQ in the quarterly payload and YoY in the annual payload; present only when calculable.

ticker.description: Ticker symbol the snapshot was requested for.

report_period.description: Most recent report period found for the ticker.

currency.description: ISO currency code in which the figures are reported.

quarterly.description: Quarterly earnings view, where change fields are quarter-over-quarter.

annual.description: Annual earnings view, where change fields are year-over-year.

earnings.description: Earnings snapshot for the ticker, split into quarterly and annual views.

value.description: Beta coefficient of stock monthly returns vs benchmark monthly returns.

ticker.description: The requested ticker symbol.

benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for beta calculation.

n_observations.description: Number of overlapping monthly observations used.

r_squared.description: Coefficient of determination for the OLS fit.

price_type.description: Price type used to compute returns.

reason.description: Present when value is null due to insufficient or invalid input data.

snapshot.description: Real-time snapshot of the stock's financial metrics.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.

market_cap.description: Total market capitalization, computed from current share price and shares outstanding.

enterprise_value.description: Total company value combining equity market cap with debt, net of cash.

price_to_earnings_ratio.description: Share price relative to earnings per share.

price_to_book_ratio.description: Share price relative to book value per share.

price_to_sales_ratio.description: Share price relative to revenue per share.

free_cash_flow_yield.description:
Free cash flow relative to market capitalization.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

peg_ratio.description: Price-to-earnings ratio relative to earnings growth.

gross_margin.description:
Gross profit expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

operating_margin.description:
Operating income expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

net_margin.description:
Net income expressed relative to revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_equity.description:
Net income expressed relative to shareholders' equity.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_assets.description:
Net income expressed relative to total assets.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

return_on_invested_capital.description:
After-tax operating profit relative to invested capital.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

asset_turnover.description: Revenue generated per unit of average total assets.

inventory_turnover.description: Cost of goods sold relative to average inventory.

receivables_turnover.description: Revenue relative to average accounts receivable.

days_sales_outstanding.description: Average number of days to collect receivables.

operating_cycle.description: Combined cycle of converting inventory and receivables into cash.

working_capital_turnover.description: Revenue generated per unit of average working capital.

current_ratio.description: Current assets relative to current liabilities.

quick_ratio.description: Liquid current assets relative to current liabilities.

cash_ratio.description: Cash and equivalents relative to current liabilities.

operating_cash_flow_ratio.description: Operating cash flow relative to current liabilities.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt relative to shareholders' equity.

debt_to_assets.description: Total debt relative to total assets.

revenue_growth.description:
Year-over-year change in revenue.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

earnings_growth.description:
Year-over-year change in earnings.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

Year-over-year change in book value.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

Change in earnings per share over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

Change in free cash flow over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

Change in operating income over the period.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

Change in EBITDA over the period.

Dividends paid relative to net income.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该比率/百分比字段是以百分数（如 25.3）还是小数（如 0.253）返回，待研发确认。]

earnings_per_share.description: Net income allocated to each outstanding common share.

book_value_per_share.description: Shareholders' equity allocated to each outstanding share.

free_cash_flow_per_share.description: Free cash flow allocated to each outstanding share.

segment.description: Breakdowns by business or operating segment.

SegmentMetadata.description: Common metadata fields for all segment responses.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, FY).

currency.description: The reporting currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

revenue.description: Revenue broken down by product and/or segment.

operating_income.description: Operating income broken down by segment.

long_lived_assets.description: Long-lived assets broken down by segment.

capital_expenditure.description: Capital expenditure broken down by segment.

income_statement.description: Income statement segment breakdowns for this period.

balance_sheet.description: Balance sheet segment breakdowns for this period.

cash_flow_statement.description: Cash flow statement segment breakdowns for this period.

url.description: The URL to the exhibit document on the SEC website.

text.description: The raw text content of the exhibit. Only included when 'include_exhibits' parameter is set to true.

bank.description: The symbol of the central bank.

name.description: The name of the central bank.

rate.description: The interest rate of the central bank.

date.description: The date of the interest rate in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol.

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g., %, cents, dollars, miles, count).

period.description: Reporting period (e.g., Q4 2025, FY 2025, or a date like 2025-04-30 for non-standard fiscal years).

period_type.description: Whether this is a quarterly or annual figure.

segment.description: Business segment, geography, or sub-category. Only present when the metric is reported for a sub-unit rather than the consolidated entity.

yoy_value.description: Year-over-year comparison value from the prior period.

source_text.description: The source text span from the filing where this value was found.

source_url.description: Direct link to the SEC filing. When available, includes a text fragment that highlights the source in the browser.

point_estimate.description: Single-point guidance when no range is given.

raw_text.description: Original guidance text from the filing.

change_direction.description: Direction: raised, lowered, maintained, initiated, withdrawn.

gaap_equivalent.description: The GAAP line item this metric adjusts.

NotFoundError.description: The specified resource was not found

PaymentRequiredError.description: The request requires a paid subscription

example.message: This endpoint requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade your plan.

ReportPeriod.name: report_period
ReportPeriod.description: Filter by exact report period date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGte.name: report_period_gte
ReportPeriodGte.description: Filter by report period greater than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLte.name: report_period_lte
ReportPeriodLte.description: Filter by report period less than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGt.name: report_period_gt
ReportPeriodGt.description: Filter by report period greater than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLt.name: report_period_lt
ReportPeriodLt.description: Filter by report period less than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
